title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Los Baños Gender and Development Focal Point System (GAD COUNCIL) 21-001, ?resolution Realigning the Amount of Two Million Five Hundred Forty-five Thousand Three Hundred Forty-six Pesos and 63/100 (P2, 545,346.63) From Various Appropriations Under the 5% Gender and Development Fund to a New Program/project Entitled Gender-responsive Covid-19 Intervention Program Through the Project LB Heal (LOS BAÑOS HEALTH SYSTEM ENHANCEMENT TO ADDRESS AND LIMIT COVID-19)
